arn.description: Amazon Resource Name for IAM policies and API calls targeting the S3 object

checksum_crc32.description: CRC32 checksum for verifying object integrity during transfers

checksum_crc32c.description: CRC32C checksum for detecting corruption in the object

checksum_crc64nvme.description: CRC64 checksum for enhanced data integrity checks

checksum_sha1.description: SHA1 checksum for verifying object authenticity and integrity

checksum_sha256.description: SHA256 checksum for cryptographic validation of the object

id.description: Unique identifier for referencing the S3 object in configurations

tags_all.description: Combined tags for categorizing and managing the S3 object

version_id.description: Version identifier for accessing specific revisions of the object
